schools.description: The school of atomism and metaphysics

schools.name: Mimamsa
schools.description: The school of interpretation and ritual

schools.name: Vedanta

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Making ancient wisdom accessible to modern minds
mission.content: We believe that the profound insights of Indian philosophy are not just historical curiosities but living wisdom that can transform our understanding of reality, consciousness, and the purpose of human life. Our mission is to make these timeless teachings accessible, relevant, and practical for contemporary seekers.
goals: Preserve and transmit authentic philosophical knowledge
Make complex concepts accessible through clear explanations
Connect ancient wisdom with modern life applications
Foster a global community of philosophical learners

app.title: Learn Anywhere
app.subtitle: Access your philosophical studies on any device

community.title: Join Our Community
community.subtitle: Connect with fellow seekers and scholars
benefits: Access to exclusive content and resources

cta.title: Begin Your Philosophical Journey
cta.subtitle: Discover the profound wisdom of Indian philosophy
